title: SCP State Frame
description: Single source of truth for an agent's current position in a workflow. Every SCP server response MUST conform to this schema.

run_id.description: Unique identifier for this execution instance. Used for resumption and stream attachment.

workflow_id.description: Blueprint ID of the workflow (e.g. invoice-processing-v1, document-approval-v1).

resource_url.description: Base URL of the SCP server for this run. Used for relative href resolution.

state.description: Current node in the FSM (e.g. AWAITING_AUDIT, PENDING_REVIEW).

status.description: Operational status: active (ready), processing (async work), awaiting_input (needs agent), completed, failed.

hint.description: Natural language 'system prompt' bridge for the LLM. Explains exactly what to do in this state and any guards.

active_skill.description: Optional. When present, the agent should fetch SKILL.md from url and inject into context.

url.description: Link to SKILL.md or skill manifest.

context_summary.description: Brief recap of previous steps to prevent context gaps.

next_states.description: Valid transitions from current state. Agent may only POST to one of these.

expects.description: Minimal JSON schema of required body (e.g. { "reason": "string" }).

is_critical.description: Whether this transition is critical (e.g. must not skip).

data.description: Context payload: local variables, tool results, file links relevant to current step.

milestones.description: Completed high-level objectives for proactive context (e.g. Identity Verified, Document Parsed).

stream_url.description: Endpoint for Streamable HTTP (NDJSON). GET with Accept: application/x-ndjson to receive state updates.

tools.description: Stage-bound tools callable in this state. Agent POSTs to href to invoke.

name.description: Tool identifier; used in invoke URL path.

href.description: URL to POST to invoke this tool.

expects.description: Minimal input schema for the LLM.

resources.description: Stage-bound resources readable in this state. Agent GETs uri.

uri.description: URL to GET to read this resource.

_links.description: HATEOAS links (e.g. all_options for full transition list).
